   3 |  139 |     import threading
   4 |  140 |     import time

  17 |  153 |     def print_progress():

  21 |  157 |         # 先等待5秒

  32 |  168 |

  40 |  176 |             if stop_event.wait(5.0):

  42 |  178 |

   2 |  138 |     """打补丁的_request方法，跟踪所有API调用的耗时"""
   3 |  139 |     import threading
   4 |  140 |     import time
   5 |  141 | 
   6 |  142 |     category_ids = _category_ids_from_request_kwargs(kwargs)

  14 |  150 |     start_time = time.time()
  15 |  151 |     stop_event = threading.Event()
  16 |  152 |     
  17 |  153 |     def print_progress():
  18 |  154 |         """后台线程：超过5秒后每5秒打印一次进度"""
  19 |  155 |         nonlocal start_time, method, url, kwargs
  20 |  156 |         
  21 |  157 |         # 先等待5秒
  22 |  158 |         if stop_event.wait(5.0):
  23 |  159 |             return  # 请求已完成

  32 |  168 |         
  33 |  169 |         # 超过5秒，开始每2秒打印进度
  34 |  170 |         while not stop_event.is_set():
  35 |  171 |             elapsed = time.time() - start_time
  36 |  172 |             progress_msg = f"[API请求] {method} {url} 正在处理中... 已耗时 {elapsed:.1f} 秒"

  39 |  175 |             # 再等待5秒或直到停止
  40 |  176 |             if stop_event.wait(5.0):
  41 |  177 |                 break
  42 |  178 |     
  43 |  179 |     # 启动后台线程
  44 |  180 |     progress_thread = threading.Thread(target=print_progress, daemon=True)
  45 |  181 |     progress_thread.start()
  46 |  182 |     
  47 |  183 |     try:
  48 |  184 |         result = _original_request(self, method, url, **kwargs)

  52 |  188 |         raise
  53 |  189 |     except requests.exceptions.Timeout as e:

  14 |  122 |                 or 'timeout' in lower_msg

   2 |  138 |     """打补丁的_request方法，跟踪所有API调用的耗时"""
   3 |  139 |     import threading

  13 |  149 | 
  14 |  150 |     start_time = time.time()
  15 |  151 |     stop_event = threading.Event()
  16 |  152 |     
  17 |  153 |     def print_progress():
  18 |  154 |         """后台线程：超过5秒后每5秒打印一次进度"""
  19 |  155 |         nonlocal start_time, method, url, kwargs
  20 |  156 |         
  21 |  157 |         # 先等待5秒
  22 |  158 |         if stop_event.wait(5.0):
  23 |  159 |             return  # 请求已完成

  32 |  168 |         
  33 |  169 |         # 超过5秒，开始每2秒打印进度
  34 |  170 |         while not stop_event.is_set():

  39 |  175 |             # 再等待5秒或直到停止
  40 |  176 |             if stop_event.wait(5.0):

  42 |  178 |

  18 |  154 |         """后台线程：超过5秒后每5秒打印一次进度"""

   1 |  137 | def _patched_request(self, method, url, **kwargs):
   2 |  138 |     """打补丁的_request方法，跟踪所有API调用的耗时"""
   3 |  139 |     import threading
   4 |  140 |     import time
   5 |  141 | 
   6 |  142 |     category_ids = _category_ids_from_request_kwargs(kwargs)
   7 |  143 |     if category_ids:
   8 |  144 |         category_labels = _category_labels_for_log(category_ids)
   9 |  145 |         lprint(
  10 |  146 |             f"[API请求] {method} {url}  body.categories（Muse 分类目录）= {category_labels}",
  11 |  147 |             trace_depth=10,
  12 |  148 |         )
  13 |  149 | 
  14 |  150 |     start_time = time.time()
  15 |  151 |     stop_event = threading.Event()
  16 |  152 |     
  17 |  153 |     def print_progress():
  18 |  154 |         """后台线程：超过5秒后每5秒打印一次进度"""
  19 |  155 |         nonlocal start_time, method, url, kwargs
  20 |  156 |         
  21 |  157 |         # 先等待5秒
  22 |  158 |         if stop_event.wait(5.0):
  23 |  159 |             return  # 请求已完成
  24 |  160 |         
  25 |  161 |         # 第一次超过5秒，打印详细的请求信息
  26 |  162 |         info_parts = [f"[API长请求] {method} {url}"]
  27 |  163 |         if kwargs.get('params'):
  28 |  164 |             info_parts.append(f"  请求参数: {kwargs.get('params')}")
  29 |  165 |         if kwargs.get('json'):
  30 |  166 |             info_parts.append(f"  请求体: {kwargs.get('json')}")
  31 |  167 |         lprint('\n'.join(info_parts),trace_depth=10)
  32 |  168 |         
  33 |  169 |         # 超过5秒，开始每2秒打印进度
  34 |  170 |         while not stop_event.is_set():
  35 |  171 |             elapsed = time.time() - start_time
  36 |  172 |             progress_msg = f"[API请求] {method} {url} 正在处理中... 已耗时 {elapsed:.1f} 秒"
  37 |  173 |             if not _inline_progress(progress_msg):
  38 |  174 |                 lprint(progress_msg, force_print=True)
  39 |  175 |             # 再等待5秒或直到停止
  40 |  176 |             if stop_event.wait(5.0):
  41 |  177 |                 break
  42 |  178 |     
  43 |  179 |     # 启动后台线程
  44 |  180 |     progress_thread = threading.Thread(target=print_progress, daemon=True)
  45 |  181 |     progress_thread.start()
  46 |  182 |     
  47 |  183 |     try:
  48 |  184 |         result = _original_request(self, method, url, **kwargs)
  49 |  185 |     except MuseError as e:
  50 |  186 |         if MUSE_NETWORK_TIMEOUT_MARK not in str(e) and _is_timeout_wrapped_muse_error(e):
  51 |  187 |             raise MuseError(f"{MUSE_NETWORK_TIMEOUT_MARK} {e}") from e
  52 |  188 |         raise
  53 |  189 |     except requests.exceptions.Timeout as e:
  54 |  190 |         raise MuseError(f"{MUSE_NETWORK_TIMEOUT_MARK} Request failed (timeout): {e}") from e
  55 |  191 |     finally:
  56 |  192 |         # 通知线程停止
  57 |  193 |         stop_event.set()
  58 |  194 |     
  59 |  195 | ... [代码过长，已截断，原始长度: 2000 字符]
